data_tablet.pages.super_glue.name: Bonded Planes
data_tablet.pages.super_glue.page1.text: Bonding Powder does not simply dry. It remembers the surfaces it is asked to join and lets the Fabricator press that memory into a workable adhesive. A slime base gives the mixture enough body to become Create's Super Glue without relying on workshop crafting.
data_tablet.pages.honey_glue.name: Amber Bonding
data_tablet.pages.honey_glue.page1.text: Honey carries a slower kind of grip. When the Fabricator folds it through Bonding Powder, the result clings to moving frames without becoming brittle. Simulated contraptions accept this amber seal as Honey Glue.
data_tablet.pages.deployer.name: Guided Hands
data_tablet.pages.deployer.page1.text: A Deployer is a hand with no will of its own. Adding a Logical Matrix gives it a small map of intention: reach, press, place, repeat. The mechanism remains Create's familiar tool, but its first impulse now comes from Essence logic.
data_tablet.pages.steam_engine.name: Pressure and Tide
data_tablet.pages.steam_engine.page1.tex: Steam is loud, impatient power. A Prepared Panel gives the engine a stable face for that pressure, while an Exciter teaches the pulse where to travel. Heat still drives the engine, but Essence gives the rhythm a clean path.
data_tablet.pages.physics_assembler.name: Anchored Bodies
data_tablet.pages.physics_assembler.page: The Physics Assembler persuades loose mass to agree on a single body. A Memory Cell preserves the last stable pattern long enough for the assembler to bind motion, rotation, and collision into one obedient structure.
data_tablet.pages.precision_mechanism.pa: The old clockwork ritual found precision by repetition. This design takes a shorter route: brass plates hold the tolerances, a Copper Shell guards the impulse, Tidal Pathways carry the instruction, and a Logical Matrix decides when every tooth is exactly where it belongs.
data_tablet.pages.portable_engine.name: Carried Fire
A Portable Engine is a furnace taught to walk beside the machine it powers. The Logical Matrix does not add strength; it adds judgement, letting the engine carry a compact set of rules for fuel, direction, and output wherever the frame travels.
